conflict: The coalition must out-circulate Gideon's single-name machine during a public blessing without letting Silas reclaim the spotlight.
consequence: Plural naming becomes visible public fact when the moss holds multiple colors at once, breaking Gideon's monopoly in front of the city.
must_land_beats: Build the chorus boards from scavenged materials so the tactic feels materially rooted in the city.
Use children, ferries, kitchens, and stoops as distribution channels rather than formal institutions.
Have Inez initiate the public naming turn, forcing Silas to support rather than dominate.
Render the chorus as messy, contradictory, and living rather than harmoniously symbolic.
Show the moss answer with plural color in a way everyone can witness and reinterpret.
pressure_source: The coalition must out-circulate Gideon's single-name machine during a public blessing without letting Silas reclaim the spotlight.
state_shift: Plural naming becomes visible public fact when the moss holds multiple colors at once, breaking Gideon's monopoly in front of the city.
texture_mode: electric, communal, argument-filled, triumphant without neatness
